message:
feat(text-effects): implement shadow and glow rendering in StyledText

Add shadow and glow layer rendering to StyledText.render_at():
- Phase 1: Render glow layers (outermost to innermost)
- Phase 2: Render shadow layers (furthest from text first)
- Phase 3: Main text renders on top (existing code)

Technical changes:
- Glow uses layer_offsets() and layer_color() for each layer
- Shadows use apply_offset() and effective_color() helpers
- Proper bounds checking with let-chains for clippy compliance

Also includes concurrent agent fixes:
- ColorGradient now derives PartialEq for OutlineStyle enum
- OFFSETS_T3 array size corrected to 24
- test_outline_gradient_animates gradient tuple format fixed
- ftui-widgets/textarea.rs: restore usize types from Cell<usize>

All 11 shadow tests + 6 glow tests pass.

Closes: bd-3hsz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
